project_specification.overview: A minimal 5-feature TODO application serving as the claw-forge plugin reference spec for pre-release validation. The app exposes a REST API backed by SQLite and a single-page React front end. Its sole purpose is to verify that the plugin's dispatch loop can implement five independent, parallel-safe features at ≥ 85 % completion rate within the 5-minute wall-clock budget defined in PRD §6.
project_specification.target_audience: claw-forge plugin developers and release engineers running the manual pre-release smoke gate. The app is never deployed to end users.

database.primary: SQLite — file path: todo.db at project root
database.schema_init: CREATE TABLE executed on startup if the table does not exist (no migration framework needed)

communication.response_format: JSON (bare objects and arrays — no envelope wrapper)

project_specification.prerequisites: - Python 3.12+ with uv installed (uv run uvicorn starts the backend) - Node.js 18+ for the Vite frontend - No external services required; SQLite is file-based and auto-created - No environment variables required for local development

feature.description: User can create a TODO item by posting a non-blank title; API POST /api/todos returns 201 with JSON body { "id": <integer>, "title": <string>, "completed": false, "created_at": <ISO-8601 string> }; API returns 422 when title is missing or blank; UI input field and "Add" button submit the request and prepend the new item to the list without a page reload

User can retrieve all TODO items; API GET /api/todos returns 200 with a JSON array of { id, title, completed, created_at } objects ordered by created_at descending (newest first); empty list returns 200 with []; UI renders the list on mount and after every mutating action

User can toggle the completed state of a TODO item; API PATCH /api/todos/{id}/toggle returns 200 with the updated item ({ id, title, completed, created_at }) or 404 when the id does not exist; UI checkbox reflects the current completed state and triggers the toggle on click, applying a line-through style to completed titles

User can edit a TODO item's title in place; API PUT /api/todos/{id} accepts { "title": <string> } and returns 200 with the updated item, 422 when title is blank, or 404 when the id does not exist; UI shows an inline edit field when the user double-clicks a title, saves on Enter or blur, and cancels on Escape

User can delete a TODO item; API DELETE /api/todos/{id} returns 204 on success or 404 when the id does not exist; UI shows a delete button (×) beside each item that removes the item from the list immediately on success without a full list refresh

table.name: todos
table.note: completed stores 0 (false) or 1 (true); the API layer converts to JSON boolean
Table is created by the backend on startup with CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS — no migration tool required

api_endpoints_summary.domain: POST /api/todos - Create a new TODO item (body: { "title": string }) GET /api/todos - List all TODO items ordered by created_at DESC PATCH /api/todos/{id}/toggle - Toggle the completed flag of a TODO item PUT /api/todos/{id} - Update the title of a TODO item (body: { "title": string }) DELETE /api/todos/{id} - Delete a TODO item

ui_layout.structure:
Single page (/) served by Vite at http://localhost:5173
Layout (top to bottom): - Heading: "My TODOs" - Add-item row: text input (placeholder "What needs doing?") + "Add" button - TODO list: each row contains • Checkbox (completed toggle) • Title text (double-click to edit inline) • Delete button (×) Completed items have a line-through style on the title text - Empty-state message: "No todos yet — add one above!" when the list is empty
No routing, no authentication, no pagination needed.

design_system.color_palette: Background: #ffffff Surface: #f9fafb Border: #e5e7eb Text primary: #111827 Text secondary: #6b7280 Accent: #f97316 (forge orange — Add button, focus rings) Danger: #ef4444 (delete button hover) Completed title: #9ca3af with line-through
design_system.typography: Font family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif Heading: text-2xl font-bold Body: text-sm font-normal
design_system.animations: Item removal: fade-out 150 ms Inline edit: no transition (instant swap)

key_interactions.interaction: 1. User types a title in the input field and clicks "Add" (or presses Enter) 2. POST /api/todos fires with { "title": <typed text> } 3. New item appears at the top of the list 4. Input field is cleared and focused

1. User checks the checkbox on an item 2. PATCH /api/todos/{id}/toggle fires; title gains line-through style 3. User clicks the × button 4. DELETE /api/todos/{id} fires; item fades out and is removed from the list

1. User double-clicks the title text 2. An input field appears pre-filled with the current title 3. User edits and presses Enter 4. PUT /api/todos/{id} fires with { "title": <new text> } 5. Title text updates in place; edit field disappears 6. If the user presses Escape, the edit is cancelled without a network call

implementation_steps.phase: Create pyproject.toml with fastapi, uvicorn[standard], aiosqlite, pydantic dependencies managed by uv Create src/main.py: FastAPI app with CORS middleware allowing http://localhost:5173 Create src/database.py: async SQLite connection helper and CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS on startup Implement all 5 REST endpoints in src/plugins/todos/router.py and register under /api Return 404 HTTPException with { "detail": "Todo not found" } for unknown ids Return 422 for blank or missing title (Pydantic validation handles this automatically)

Scaffold React + Vite + TypeScript project in frontend/ with Tailwind CSS Create src/features/todos/api.ts: typed fetch helpers for all 5 API operations Create src/features/todos/TodoList.tsx: list component wired to GET /api/todos Create src/features/todos/TodoItem.tsx: row with checkbox, inline-edit, and delete button Create src/features/todos/AddTodo.tsx: input + button wired to POST /api/todos Wire everything in src/App.tsx; run on http://localhost:5173 proxying /api to http://localhost:8000
Verify all 5 API contracts with curl commands (documented in README) Verify UI interactions per key_interactions section Confirm empty-state, 404, and 422 error paths

success_criteria.functionality: POST /api/todos returns 201 with correct body shape GET /api/todos returns 200 with array ordered newest-first PATCH /api/todos/{id}/toggle returns 200 with toggled completed field PUT /api/todos/{id} returns 200 with updated title DELETE /api/todos/{id} returns 204 All endpoints return 404 for unknown id POST and PUT return 422 for blank title
success_criteria.ux: New item appears at top of list after Add Completed items show line-through style Inline edit saves on Enter, cancels on Escape Deleted items are removed from the list without full reload Empty-state message shows when list is empty
success_criteria.technical_quality: Backend starts with: uv run uvicorn src.main:app --reload Frontend starts with: npm run dev inside frontend/ No TypeScript type errors (tsc --noEmit passes) No Python type errors (pyright or mypy passes) SQLite file is gitignored
success_criteria.completion_gate: ≥ 4 of 5 features fully implemented and verifiable (85 % threshold) All 5 features implemented and verifiable is the target (100 %)
